contact_point_world.source_variable: model_ops['pred_points'] -> contact_point, after CGN convert_cam_coords and FRAME_ROTATE.T

approach_dir_world.source_variable: model_ops['approach_dir_pred'] -> approach_dir, after CGN convert_cam_coords and FRAME_ROTATE.T

base_dir_world.source_variable: model_ops['grasp_dir_pred'] -> base_dir, after CGN convert_cam_coords, FRAME_ROTATE.T, plus ROTATE_Z symmetry duplicate sign flip

object_id.source_variable: pc_segments key - 1 after mask-bit grouping and CGN filter_segment

source_index.source_variable: selected CGN source tensor index before filter_segment
